bridge_equation_v39.plasticity_term: B_plastic_v39 = mix(B_plastic_v38, L_sys_field_stable, 1 - P_sys_field_stable, D_feature_v33, 1 - G_brain_v33)
bridge_equation_v39.structure_term: B_struct_v39 = mix(B_struct_v38, S_sys_field_stable, R_sys_field_stable, 1 - P_sys_field_stable, D_structure_v33)
bridge_equation_v39.readiness_term: R_train_v39 = mix(R_train_v38, B_plastic_v39, B_struct_v39, R_sys_field_stable, D_align_v33, 1 - P_sys_field_stable)

project_readout.summary: training bridge v39 checks whether systemic low-risk field stabilization begins to reduce rule-layer risk in a more stable and field-like way.
project_readout.next_question: next verify whether this stabilized low-risk field still survives after it is folded into the next closed-form core.
